spec.objective:
QUESTION: Find all bugs, errors, anti-patterns, null-safety issues, threading problems, resource leaks, incorrect API usage, and any other code issues in the feature/ layer of this Android Kotlin project — Part 1.

SCOPE: All .kt files under:
- app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/analysis/ (HabitAnalyzer.kt, components/HabitReportSheet.kt)
- app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/crash/ (CrashReportActivity.kt)
- app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/learning/ (OfflineLearningEngine.kt)
- app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/library/ (HomeScreen.kt, LibraryViewModel.kt, ads/HomeAdStrategy.kt, components/ ALL .kt files)
- app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/permissions/ (PermissionScreen.kt)
- app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/privacy/ (PinScreen.kt)
- app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/splash/ (AnimatedSplashScreen.kt)

EFFORT: thorough — read every file completely, don't skim.
STOP_CONDITION: Stop when all listed files have been read and analyzed.
OUTPUT: For each file with issues found, report:
- File path
- Line number (approximate)
- Issue severity (CRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW)
- Description of the bug/error/issue
- Suggested fix
Also list files that are clean (no issues found). Group findings by severity.

spec.objective:
QUESTION: Find all bugs, errors, anti-patterns, null-safety issues, threading problems, resource leaks, incorrect API usage, and any other code issues in the core/ layer of this Android Kotlin project.

SCOPE: All .kt files under app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/core/ — including:
- core/ads/ (AdBanner.kt, AdManager.kt, InterstitialAdTrigger.kt, NativeAdViewCompose.kt, RewardedAdCompose.kt)
- core/data/ (PrivacyRepository.kt, SettingsRepository.kt, VideoRepository.kt)
- core/database/ (VideoDao.kt, VideoDatabase.kt, entities/BookmarkEntity.kt, entities/VideoMetadataEntity.kt, di/DatabaseModule.kt)
- core/ffmpeg/ (FFmpegManager.kt)
- core/media/ (MediaScanner.kt, MediaSmartCategorizer.kt)
- core/model/ (Video.kt)
- core/playback/ (AudioEffectManager.kt, ExoPlayerImpl.kt, MediaPlaybackManager.kt, PlaybackService.kt, PlaybackState.kt, VideoPlayer.kt, di/PlaybackModule.kt)
- core/scanner/ (ScannerIntelligentThumbnailEngine.kt, ScannerStorageAnalyzer.kt)
- core/theme/ (Color.kt, Theme.kt, Type.kt)
- core/util/ (DummyData.kt)

EFFORT: thorough — read every file completely, don't skim.
STOP_CONDITION: Stop when all listed files have been read and analyzed.
OUTPUT: For each file with issues found, report:
- File path
- Line number (approximate if line numbers aren't returned)
- Issue severity (CRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW)
- Description of the bug/error/issue
- Suggested fix
Also list files that are clean (no issues found). Group findings by severity.
